water.name: Salmon Creek and tributaries above Highway 1

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(128) — Salmon Creek and tributaries above Highway 1 (Monterey Co.)
sources.quotedText: (128) Salmon Creek and tributaries above Highway 1 (Monterey Co.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 273408, "Salmon Creek", Stream, Monterey Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":273408,"gaz_name":"Salmon Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Monterey"}; geometry multipoint, points (Web Mercator -13510129.0372,4274276.2896) and (-13507570.2921,4281413.4716) convert to lon/lat (-121.363554, 35.808304) and (-121.340568, 35.860283) — the coastal Salmon Creek near Ragged Point/Highway 1 (distinct from a second unrelated interior 'Salmon Creek', gaz_id 273409, ~13km east near -121.19W, not adjacent to Highway 1). The file's coordinate (-121.3588, 35.8157) sits ~928m from the nearer (lower) GNIS point and lies almost exactly on the line between the two GNIS points, consistent with Wikipedia's independently-sourced Salmon Creek Falls coordinate (35.81934, -121.35206, ~730m away) along this same short stream — within tolerance for a linear stream feature; coordinate confirmed.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: 0 trout — catch-and-release only during the open season

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.
